generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've lived in this neighborhood for 15 years, and let me tell you, the only way our community stays strong is when everyone embraces our values. We've seen what happens when people don't integrate - it's not about being unwelcoming, it's about preserving what makes us who we are. Look at the stats: neighborhoods that prioritize shared culture have lower crime rates and better schools. It's not about shutting anyone out, it's about making sure everyone buys into the same vision. That's how we keep our community thriving.
